title: Complete Contract File for 47QSWA23D0028 (Universal Protection Service, LP dba Allied Universal Security Services)

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: Complete Contract File for 47QSWA23D0028 (Universal Protection Service, LP dba Allied Universal Security Services)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to 5 U.S.C. § 552, I request the complete contract file for Contract No. 47QSWA23D0028 with Universal Protection Service, Limited Partnership dba Allied Universal Security Services (contractor of record on GSA eLibrary). Records requested include, but are not limited to: the signed award; SF-30 modifications; terms & conditions; pricing/discounts; Commercial Sales Practices/Price Proposal; CSP/BOA if any; Statement(s) of Work/Performance Work Statements; Labor Category descriptions; Quality Assurance Surveillance Plan; Small Business Subcontracting Plan (if any); and any other attachments incorporated into the award, Resumes of key employees, without Personally Identifiable Information.
Please include the contractor’s GSA price list/terms and the current period of performance (noting GSA Advantage shows 12/22/2022–12/21/2027). GSA E-Library+1GSA Advantage

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Deneuve Brutus

communications.subject: Florida Sunshine Law Request: Police disciplinary files
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Florida Sunshine Law, I hereby request the following records:

- Any and all lists, spreadsheets or other organized datasets that detail potential or substantiated allegations of misconduct and/or impeached or impeachable testimony, created under Brady v. Maryland and/or Giglio v. United States.
- Any and all records regarding substantiated allegations of misconduct or violations of internal department policy or criminal law by specific law enforcement officers.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 10 business days.

Sincerely,

Deneuve Brutus

title: FOIA of Security Industry Specialists, Inc. (SIS)

communications.subject: Freedom of Information Act Request: FOIA of Security Industry Specialists, Inc. (SIS)
communications.communication:
To Whom It May Concern:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, I hereby request the following records:

Pursuant to the Freedom of Information Act, 5 U.S.C. § 552, I hereby request the following records:
All contracts, task orders, delivery orders, modifications, and related procurement documents issued to or held by Security Industry Specialists, Inc. (SIS) from January 1, 2015 through December 31, 2020, including but not limited to:

All base contract awards (including GSA Schedule/Multiple Award Schedule contracts, IDIQ contracts, and any standalone contracts)
All task orders and delivery orders issued against any GSA contract vehicle held by SIS during the specified period
All contract modifications (unilateral and bilateral)
Statements of Work or Performance Work Statements associated with the above

Relevant identifiers:

Contractor: Security Industry Specialists, Inc. (also known as SIS)
NAICS Code: 561612 (Security Guards and Patrol Services)
Period: January 1, 2015 – December 31, 2020

I request a fee waiver on the grounds that disclosure is in the public interest and will contribute significantly to public understanding of government contracting activities. If a fee waiver is denied, please notify me before incurring costs exceeding $25.
If any records are withheld in whole or in part, please provide a Vaughn index specifying the exemption(s) claimed and the basis for each withholding.

The requested documents will be made available to the general public, and this request is not being made for commercial purposes.

In the event that there are fees, I would be grateful if you would inform me of the total charges in advance of fulfilling my request. I would prefer the request filled electronically, by e-mail attachment if available or CD-ROM if not.

Thank you in advance for your anticipated cooperation in this matter. I look forward to receiving your response to this request within 20 business days, as the statute requires.

Sincerely,

Deneuve Brutus
